text:
ふはははっ！
やはり、君と組んで正解だった！
最高にアツくなれたぞ！

君の戦い方からは
このオレも学ぶことが多いぞ！
まだまだ努力しなくてはな！

「宿題」はまだ終わっていないが
誘ってくれれば、いつでも海に行くぞ！
遠慮なく呼び出してくれ

Mwahahaha! I knew teaming up with you
would be the right move! Couldn't you just
feel the burning passion?

And I learned ever-so-much! It seems I have a
long path ahead of me before I reach you.

Which reminds me, I've still a bit of
homework to get through but if you
ever need a hand on the beach, you
know who to call!
